map: VIDEO-DOCUMENTED: GREEN forest/grass entrance -> dark GOTHIC STONE corridors & rooms (gray/black tiled) -> PURPLE-tiled rooms -> a RED final boss arena tiled with CROSS/X (tombstone) patterns. Branching graveyard/tomb dungeon. A white-robed skeletal boss figure appears in mid rooms.

bosses.name: Gravedigger
taunts: Let's see how you handle this...
Death is your reward! Say no more and FINISH...
...your courage softens me. I could grant you a...

bosses.name: Necro Doggo / Werewolf (wiki — drops Claw of the Beast)
white-robed grave boss (seen in mid rooms; likely a lich/grave caretaker)

minions: Troll Matriarch, Ghost Bride, Grave Caretaker, Ghost of Skuld (wiki — drop Undead's Gross Bow)
drops: Undead's Gross Bow (Troll Matriarch/Ghost Bride/Grave Caretaker/Ghost of Skuld)
uncertain: Necropolis-specific boss taunts (other than Gravedigger, from another clip) not isolated in this sample — chat was dominated by the SERVER-WIDE event/death feed (which itself yielded the event-boss roster above). Map is clearly documented from the contact sheet.
confidence: HIGH for map (green->gothic stone->purple->red-cross arena) + Gravedigger taunts; MEDIUM for the event-boss roster (verbatim spawn announcements); drops cross-checked vs wiki.
